topics.title: Clarifying Wedding Rumors
topics.summary: The studio addresses a tabloid report regarding the host's wedding plans while he clarifies his comments about the ceremony size to his fiancée.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Memorabilia and Legal News
topics.summary: The studio discusses O.J. Simpson's efforts to reclaim stolen memorabilia, including the suit from his trial, while critiquing his current appearance and public image.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Robbery Case Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal implications and evidence surrounding O.J. Simpson's recent arrest for an armed robbery involving a recorded confrontation.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Legal Analysis and Caller Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential legal outcomes for O.J. Simpson, including charges of armed robbery and conspiracy, before taking calls from listeners who offer racially charged commentary on the case.

topics.title: Chess Championships and Porn Star Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses the world chess championships in Mexico before transitioning to an interview with a porn star and her mother.

topics.title: Tabitha Stevens and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features Tabitha Stevens as she interacts with her mother over a phone call and participates in a game where she selects a male performer for an upcoming film.

topics.title: Barbara Walters Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Barbara Walters regarding her experiences interviewing presidents, her professional relationship with Rosie O'Donnell, and her personal life.

topics.title: Joan Rivers Career and Industry Critique
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Joan Rivers discussing her career history, the behavior of young celebrities, and the competitive landscape of television networks.

topics.title: Joan Rivers Discusses Emmy Coverage and Phil Spector
topics.summary: The studio features Joan Rivers discussing her experience with the Emmy Awards, her commentary on various celebrities, and anecdotes regarding producer Phil Spector.

topics.title: New England Patriots Coaching Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout of a cheating scandal involving Bill Belichick and the use of illegal technology to gain an advantage over opposing teams.

topics.title: Detroit Tour and Adult Film Production
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a comedy tour in Detroit, the logistics of fan interactions, and a live phone call with an adult film performer during a production.

topics.title: Bigfoot and Tabitha Stevens Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a segment involving an individual known as Bigfoot and his interaction with Tabitha, followed by the airing of various clips including a man singing at a funeral and old family recordings.

topics.title: Radio Show News Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming guests, listener feedback on recent segments, and various news items including celebrity interviews and personal updates from the cast.

topics.title: Retirement Plans and O.J. Simpson Legal Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential retirement timelines for radio personalities, the growth of satellite radio as a pioneering medium, and the legal developments surrounding O.J. Simpson's burglary charges.

topics.title: Robbie Robertson and Sopranos Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses a fan letter from Robbie Robertson's daughter, the artistic legacy of the E Street Band, and the controversial series finale of The Sopranos.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including Emmy Award performances, celebrity news regarding Britney Spears and Jodie Foster, Alan Greenspan's book on the Iraq War, and a series of upcoming concert dates.
